issue.message: Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
issue.errorLine1: .commit() // commit() not apply() — we may die before apply() flushes

issue.message: Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
issue.errorLine1: .commit() // synchronous: an identity lost to a force-stop breaks pairing

issue.message: Field requires API level 34 (current min is 29): `android.content.pm.ServiceInfo#FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_SPECIAL_USE`
Field requires API level 34 (current min is 29): `android.content.pm.ServiceInfo#FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_SPECIAL_USE`
Field requires API level 34 (current min is 29): `android.content.pm.ServiceInfo#FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_SPECIAL_USE`
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Attribute `dataExtractionRules` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html
Consider adding a `<queries>` declaration to your manifest when calling this \ method; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details
Consider adding a `<queries>` declaration to your manifest when calling this \ method; see https://g.co/dev/packagevisibility for details
Expecting `android:screenOrientation="unspecified"` or `"fullSensor"` for this activity so the user can use the application in any orientation and provide a great experience on Chrome OS devices
You should not lock orientation of your activities, so that you can support a good user experience for any device or orientation
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter
Should not restrict activity to fixed orientation. This may not be suitable for different form factors, causing the app to be letterboxed.
Repeated word "android" in message: possible typo
issue.errorLine1: <string name="bg_adb_cmd1">adb shell pm grant com.copypaste.android android.permission.READ_LOGS</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("older"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dialog_max_items_reduce_body">Lowering the maximum stored items will permanently delete %1$d older unpinned item(s). Pinned items are kept. This cannot be undone.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("selected"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("item"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("clipboard"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dialog_clear_all_message">This will permanently delete all %1$d clipboard items. This cannot be undone.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("selected"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dialog_delete_selected_message">This will permanently delete %1$d selected items. This cannot be undone.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("items"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Missing x86_64 ABI support for ChromeOS
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is never < 26
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 26
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is never < 26

This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.

The image `ic_launcher.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher.png: 33x33 dp (49x49 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher.png: 48x48 dp (48x48 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 48x48 dp (96x96 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 48x48 dp (144x144 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 48x48 dp (192x192 px)

The image `ic_launcher_round.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 33x33 dp (49x49 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 48x48 dp (48x48 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 48x48 dp (96x96 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 48x48 dp (144x144 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 48x48 dp (192x192 px)
